result.reason: Unhandled exception on application close with multiple panels indicates a resource disposal or shutdown sequence issue within the UI component management, specifically with WeifenLuo.WinFormsUI.Docking.DockPanel.
result.approach: Investigate the application shutdown sequence, focusing on the disposal of DockPanel and its contents. Pinpoint the unhandled exception using a debugger and implement proper resource cleanup, null checks, or synchronization to prevent accessing disposed objects or race conditions during closure.
